description: Add a chat provider resolver module that returns provider id, model, OpenAI-compatible client, and provider-specific request overrides
Default provider selection to OpenRouter when provider config is missing or invalid
Resolve OpenRouter credentials and model from secret/env sources in provider resolver
Resolve Vertex credentials, model, and endpoint settings from secret/env sources in provider resolver
Support explicit Vertex base URL override with project/location-derived URL fallback
Support provider-scoped turn-level thinking override payload for Vertex requests
Extend chat completion message contract with optional reasoning_content field in EE server and client types
Update completion/execute/stream request validation to accept reasoning_content on assistant messages
Preserve reasoning_content through conversation normalization and model-message conversion
Refactor non-stream completion path to use provider resolver instead of hardcoded OpenRouter client
Refactor streaming completion path to use provider resolver instead of hardcoded OpenRouter client
Keep tool definitions and tool_choice:auto semantics consistent across OpenRouter and Vertex providers
Parse provider reasoning fields into canonical assistant content handling while retaining existing OpenRouter behavior
Attach preserved reasoning_content to assistant messages added to in-memory model conversation during tool loops
Ensure function_proposed responses include conversation state that retains preserved reasoning_content
Ensure execute-after-approval continuation keeps preserved assistant reasoning when replaying tool result
Replace raw token-only stream route behavior with structured stream events that can represent reasoning/content/function states
Define and emit structured SSE content-delta events
Define and emit structured SSE reasoning-delta events
Define and emit structured SSE function-proposal events from streaming tool decisions
Emit a terminal done event consistently for completed streams
Maintain safe stream cancellation/abort handling without leaking partial invalid state
Extend readAssistantContentFromSse utility to parse structured event payloads for content, reasoning, function proposals, and done
Update Chat send/stream flow to consume structured reasoning and content events
Update Chat streaming path to populate pendingFunction from streamed function proposal events
Preserve existing approve/decline execution handshake with /api/chat/v1/execute using streamed proposal metadata
Ensure Quick Ask flow inherits restored streaming function-calling behavior through shared Chat component
Ensure Sidebar Chat flow inherits restored streaming function-calling behavior through shared Chat component
Keep backward-compatible stream payload handling during transition so existing content-token rendering does not regress
Keep EE and aiAssistant API gating unchanged across completions, execute, and stream endpoints
Document provider configuration contract for OpenRouter and Vertex in root and EE env examples
Preserve existing message persistence behavior without requiring new database schema
